notes: Mostly scaffolding and stubs: pullbackCoeff_comp has a tautological proof (rfl on f 1 * g 1 = f 1 * g 1) making it a parked placeholder. formalMulByInt_coeff carries an acknowledged correctness gap (higher coefficients for negative m are not properly composed with formalInverse_coeff). dual_additivity_algebraic has three declared hypotheses (ha, hb, hab) that are unused in its proof body, and is the only declaration actively used by another file (PullbackCoeff.lean).
